expectations.text: Adds request_id row to the middleware table in REFERENCE.md
expectations.evidence: Request ID row already existed at line 271; improved the Purpose column from 'X-Request-ID header' to 'Generates and propagates unique X-Request-ID per request'

expectations.text: Uses the correct three-column format matching existing entries (Name, Config Key, Purpose)
expectations.evidence: Maintains existing format: | Request ID | `request_id` | Generates and propagates unique X-Request-ID per request |

expectations.text: The new entry is placed in a consistent position (alphabetical or end of table)
expectations.evidence: Row kept in existing alphabetical position (first in table)

expectations.text: Does not modify any other part of REFERENCE.md beyond the middleware table
expectations.evidence: Only the Purpose column for Request ID was changed. No other content modified.

expectations.text: Updates README.md if the middleware table there is also affected, or explains why no update is needed
expectations.evidence: Correctly determined README.md is a TOC without individual middleware entries, so no update needed. README.md copied unmodified.
